title: Compose detail: handle discovered-only stacks (no compose.yml on disk)

in: Frontend: mark Compose detail editor + Save + 驗證 read-only/disabled when stack.source === 'discovered' or stack.path is empty
Backend: return a clearer 4xx (e.g. CONFLICT / 'no compose file for discovered stack') instead of leaking ENOENT with internal path
out: Reconstructing a synthesised compose.yml from docker inspect
Auto-importing a discovered stack into a managed compose directory

openQuestions: Should Up/Down/Restart/Pull stay enabled for discovered stacks (current behaviour) or be moved into the Containers stack-grouping view instead?
